title: Create: Gears and Tavern
description: A addon mod for Create and Kaleidoscope Tavern to make it easy for players to automate their taverns.
body:
# Create: Gears and Tavern

> A addon mod for Create and Kaleidoscope Tavern to make it easy for players to automate their taverns.

## Introduction

- The barrel supports create's transportation system
- Wine can be produced automatically through create

## Create More Mods

- [FluidLogistic](https://modrinth.com/mod/createfluidlogistic)

![The barrel supports create's transportation system](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cb5d9d7098bc13d77ac44f5a0ef0135bb1903a2d.png)
